owner_boundary.summary: Lode declares stable failure class meaning and consumer hints. Core owns final envelope fields, and App owns final presentation.

classes.trigger: Package manifest, schema, lifecycle, post-check, resource, fixture, or failure mapping contract is malformed or contradicts package identity.
classes.recovery_hint: Repair the package asset contract before admission or execution.

classes.trigger: Current Harbor facts cannot satisfy the required Xiaohongshu browser, page, source-ref, or evidence-ref profile.
classes.owner: WebEnvoy Core admission with Harbor fact inputs
classes.recovery_hint: Open a supported Xiaohongshu page in the bound browser and request fresh Harbor facts.

classes.trigger: The Xiaohongshu page route, store shape, source refs, or field mapping no longer matches the package fixture and post-check expectations.
classes.owner: Lode package maintainer after Core/Harbor detects source or mapping drift
classes.recovery_hint: Refresh source shape, fixture, normalizer, or post-check requirements without storing live raw evidence in Lode.

classes.trigger: A valid read produces no note cards or detail fields for the requested target.
classes.owner: WebEnvoy Core result projection from Lode output classification
classes.recovery_hint: Surface an empty state; do not treat it as package or runtime failure.

classes.trigger: The Xiaohongshu page shows a login wall or the user store does not report an active account.
classes.owner: WebEnvoy Core admission with Harbor page facts
classes.recovery_hint: Ask the user to log in manually in the bound browser profile, then retry.

classes.trigger: The page initially had account indicators but later redirects to login or rejects read probes.
classes.owner: WebEnvoy Core admission with Harbor page facts
classes.recovery_hint: Ask the user to refresh the Xiaohongshu login in the same browser profile.

classes.trigger: Vue app, Pinia store, route, result grid, or note detail map is unavailable within the current execution window.
classes.owner: WebEnvoy Core runtime read using Harbor page facts
classes.recovery_hint: Wait for page hydration or refresh the target route before retrying.

classes.trigger: A detail read lacks the signed note URL parameter or search follow-up ref needed by Xiaohongshu.
classes.owner: WebEnvoy Core input projection from Lode follow-up refs
classes.recovery_hint: Use a note URL emitted by search-notes or preserve the full signed URL from the page.

classes.trigger: The page shows a verification, abnormal traffic, or safety challenge prompt.
classes.owner: Harbor page facts consumed by Core
classes.recovery_hint: Stop automation and ask the user to resolve the challenge manually; do not bypass it.

classes.trigger: A required public field such as title, author, body summary, interaction metrics, or source citation is absent.
classes.recovery_hint: Treat as partial result or repair package mapping after fresh evidence refs are available.

classes.trigger: Network or browser resource facts report a failed read, blocked request, stale source ref, or missing evidence ref.
classes.owner: WebEnvoy Core with Harbor evidence facts
classes.recovery_hint: Request fresh browser, source, and evidence refs; do not store raw runtime material in Lode.

consumer_boundary.core: Core may consume category, outcome_hint, retryable, and requires_user_action as compatibility hints, but Core owns the final envelope schema.
consumer_boundary.app: App may consume display and severity as presentation hints, but App owns final UI copy.
consumer_boundary.lode: Lode validator checks identity, required classes, and forbidden fields only; it does not execute runtime matching.

non_goals: No live runtime matching, external writes, credentials, production payloads, or raw evidence bodies.
